data.title: Trump Praises Musk During White House Meeting
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his admiration for Elon Musk during a White House cabinet meeting on April 10. In Musk's presence, Trump stated, "I don't need Elon to do anything; I just happen to like him." He praised Musk for his excellent work and revealed that he had purchased a red Tesla Model S at the highest price to show his support for Musk.

data.title: Babylon (BABY) is now available on Gate.io Launchpool
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will start BABY staking mining from 15:00 on April 11 to 15:00 on April 18 (UTC+8). Staking BABY, BTC, and USDT to participate in Launchpool can share 1,600,000 BABY airdrops for free. Among them, the BABY mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 1062.67%, the BTC mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 10.41%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 127.52%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Possibly affected by the official abolition of the IRS DeFi broker rules, CRV briefly broke through 0.6 USDT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that, perhaps affected by the official abolition of the IRS DeFi broker rules, CRV briefly broke through 0.6 USDT and is now quoted at 0.599 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 18.54%. 
Earlier news, US President Trump has signed a bill to officially abolish the IRS (Internal Revenue Service) DeFi crypto broker rules. This is the first cryptocurrency bill signed into law by the president.

data.title: Monad Testnet Sees Significant Growth in Address Count
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data reveals that the Monad testnet has reached a total of 150,254,985 addresses. In the past 24 hours, the network has added 5,595,505 new addresses, indicating substantial growth.

data.title: Trump: I don't need Musk to do anything, I just happen to like him
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said in front of Musk at a White House cabinet meeting on April 10: "I don't need Elon to do anything, I just happen to like him." Trump praised Musk for "doing a great job" and revealed that he had bought a red Tesla Model S at the "highest price" to express his support for Musk. (Global Network)

data.title: Ethereum ‘Set For Potential Rally’ After 10% Surge – Can ETH Recover $1,800?
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has recovered 10% in the past 24 hours, driven by the US administration’s 90-day pause on the trade tariffs for over 75 nations. The second-largest crypto by market capitalization now targets the $1,800 resistance as the next key level to reclaim for a rally continuation. Related Reading: Bitcoin (BTC) Jumps To $82,000 As Trump Announces 90-Day Pause On Tariffs Except China Ethereum Jumps To $1,600 Ethereum’s price hit a 2-year low of $1,385 during this week’s correction, fueling a bearish sentiment among many investors. The cryptocurrency lost the lower zone of its $2,100-$3,900 macro range on March 9 and has retraced around 16% in the past month
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum-set-for-potential-rally-after-10-surge-can-eth-recover-1800/

data.title: Avalanche (AVAX) Price Eyes $25 Breakout As VanEck Joins ETF Train
data.description:
VanEck, a major asset management firm, has taken a big step toward bringing Avalanche (AVAX) into the ETF world. The company recently applied with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to list an Avalanche ETF on the Nasdaq stock exchange
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/11/avalanche-avax-price-eyes-25-breakout-as-vaneck-joins-etf-train/

data.title: BNB Price Recovery in Motion—Uphill Battle Ahead Near Crucial $600 Level
data.description:
BNB price is recovering from the $535 support zone. The price is now consolidating gains and might face hurdles near $588 and $600. BNB price is attempting to recover above the $575 resistance zone. The price is now trading above $565 and the 100-hourly simple moving average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/bnb/bnb-price-recovery-in-motion-600/

data.title: US crypto miners may rush to buy rigs in tariff pause despite ‘clear disadvantage’
data.description:
US Bitcoin mining firms will try to capitalize on the Trump administration’s recent tariff pause by stocking up on mining rigs, but the baseline 10% tariffs will still leave the industry at a disadvantage, industry executives say. President Donald Trump paused his administration's hefty reciprocal tariffs until July 8, but kept a minimum 10% tariff on most countries bar China, which had its rate hiked to 145%. Hashlabs CEO Jaran Mellerud told Cointelegraph that while the 10% levy is much lighter than the initial tariffs, US miners are still at a “clear disadvantage” when it comes to purchasing mining machines, compared to competitors abroad. He said the baseline US tariffs aren’t enough “to make mining in the US unprofitable, but it definitely raises capital expenditure and will impact the long-term viability of new investments
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-miners-may-rush-buy-rigs-trump-tariff-pause?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
